Title: Enacts the ride N.Y. act ordering a New York integrated travel project
Summary: Directs the New York State Department of Transportation to conduct an integrated travel project in tandem with the Office of General Services, Department of Motor Vehicles, regional transportation authorities and county-run public transit providers to address state-wide transportation needs.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to enacting the "ride N.Y. act" ordering a New York integrated travel project
